96ad26207699174dbbf3739258c3f6da.skill_verdict: Strong proficiency in Python-based Machine Learning (LightGBM, ONNX, Scikit-learn, NumPy) with experience in building and deploying ML pipelines (Flask API). Solid understanding of MERN stack principles (Node.js, Express, MongoDB) for backend development. Demonstrates ability to architect and implement complex data processing and prediction systems.

issues.problem: Try, Except, Pass detected. This can mask critical errors and make debugging difficult, potentially hiding security vulnerabilities or unexpected behavior.
issues.fix: Replace 'pass' with specific error handling (logging, raising custom exceptions, or providing default values) to ensure robust error management and visibility into failures.
